base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of moblin_walk_shoot — a character (minion) from 1986 legend of zelda. Moblin — bulldog-faced pig-knight. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Moblin — bulldog-faced pig-knight; 4-dir walk cycle with arrow-shoot. Hides in forests. Drops rupees occasionally
